mayhem.description_html:
After using the {{si|Dash}} spell from {{si|Mark}}, you become {{tip|invulnerable}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds upon arrival. Additionally, your {{sis|Mark}} cooldown is reduced equivalent to 100 ability haste.

''If {{si|Mark}} is not equipped, the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by {{si|Flash}} is replaced with {{si|Mark}}. If you also did not equip {{si|Flash}}, then you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with {{si|Mark}}.''

mayhem.title: Triggered Inferno
mayhem.description_html:
Your damaging basic attacks and abilities against at least one enemy {{tip|champion}} unique from the previous damaging hit made against champions generate a stack of ''Style'' for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent unique or non-unique hits and stacking up to 6 times. For each stack, gain {{as|{{pp|4.25 to 5 for 4|1 to 16|key=%}} '''bonus''' movement speed}}, up to a maximum of {{as|{{pp|25.5 to 30 for 4|1 to 16|key=%}}|ms}}.

Upon reaching maximum ''Style'' stacks, you unleash a torrent of shots for {{rutngt|2.25}}, during which you rapidly shoot at nearby enemies over {{rutngt|2}} at sporadic times in {{tt|{{fd|0.2}}-second intervals|on average; total of 5 intervals of 0.231 and 5 of 0.198 seconds}} each (up to 10 times per enemy), dealing {{as|{{pp|20 to 40}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 40% AD)}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}} {{as|physical damage}} with each shot, reduced by 75% against {{tip|minions}}. Enemies below {{as|30% of their '''maximum''' health}} are {{tip|critical strike|critically struck}} for{{ft|double damage|{{as|{{pp|20*2 to 40*2}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ {{ap|40*2}}% AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*2}}% AP)}} {{as|physical damage}}}}(15 second cooldown). This effect ends prematurely if you become affected by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}.

''Shot damage {{tip|applies lifesteal|applies}} {{as|life steal}}. Style stacks are consumed at the end of the shooting effect.''

mayhem.title: Juiced
mayhem.description_html: Basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} against enemy champions consume {{as|{{fd|2.5}}% of your '''maximum''' mana}} to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to {{as|{{fd|4.5}}% of your '''maximum''' mana}}. This damage can {{tip|critically strike}} for {{critical damage|100}} '''bonus''' damage.

mayhem.title: Kill Secured
mayhem.description_html: Gain {{as|60% '''bonus''' movement speed}} towards enemy champions below {{as|40% of their '''maximum''' health}}.

mayhem.title: Phenomenal Evil
mayhem.description_html:
Gain {{cai|Phenomenal Evil Power|Veigar}}.

{{sbc|Phenomenal Evil Power:}} Generate a permanent stack of ''Phenomenal Evil'' each time you damage an enemy champion with {{tip|ability damage}}. This effect cannot trigger more than once every second globally and once every 3 seconds from the same {{tip|cast instance}}. For each stack, gain {{as|1 ability power}}.

If this is not your first augment, start with 40 ''Phenomenal Evil'' stacks, granting you {{as|40 ability power}}.
mayhem.notes_html: * The 40 bonus stacks for selecting this augment as not your first augment are given once the first stack is earned.

mayhem.title: Pinball
mayhem.description_html:
Your {{si|Mark}} is empowered to instead throw a pinball, which deals {{as|{{pp|100 to 500}} '''bonus''' true damage}} and ricochets off of terrain that it collides with. Each time the pinball ricochets, its remaining travel distance is reset, it increases in radius by 25%, deals 20% increased damage, and reduces {{sis|Mark}} remaining cooldown by 30% of its total. The pinball can ricochet up to 4 times, for a maximum radius increase of 100% and a damage increase of 80%. Additionally, your {{sis|Mark}} cooldown is reduced equivalent to 50 ability haste.

''If {{si|Mark}} is not equipped, the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by {{si|Flash}} is replaced with {{si|Mark}}. If you also did not equip {{si|Flash}}, then you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with {{si|Mark}}.''

mayhem.title: Poro Blaster
mayhem.description_html:
You summon a [[File:Fat Poro Icon.png|20px|link=]] ''Poro'' alongside yourself every {{fd|3.5}} seconds, up to 5 at a time. Damaging an enemy champion with a basic attack or ability, excluding those which apply {{tip|persistent damage|damage over time}}, commands all of your ''Poros'' to launch themselves at the target, each dealing {{as|true damage}} equal to {{as|3% of the target's '''maximum''' health}}. If triggered while at the maximum number of summoned ''Poros'', the first ''Poro'' to hit the target also {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} for {{fd|0.5}} seconds.

This augment is only offered to up to 1 player on each team for a given game.

mayhem.title: Prom Queen
mayhem.description_html:
{{as|Automatically}} cast a modified version of {{cai|The Quickness|Rakan}}, empowering you to break into a captivating sprint for 6 seconds. While empowered, you gain {{tip|ghosting}} and {{as|50% '''bonus''' movement speed}}, and enemies you {{tt|collide with|300 unit collision radius}} are {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} and become {{tip|charm|charmed}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds (25 second cooldown).

''A sparkly tiara will descend upon you {{fd|2.5}} seconds before the effect activates.''

mayhem.title: Purist - Caster
mayhem.description_html: Convert '''all''' of your {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} into {{as|ability haste}} at a rate of {{as|{{fd|0.65}} ability haste}} per {{as|1% '''bonus''' attack speed}}. Additionally, your abilities' '''total''' cooldowns are reduced by 10%.

mayhem.title: Quest: Icathia's Fall
mayhem.description_html:
Gain {{ii|Bami's Cinder}}. You can now purchase {{ii|Hollow Radiance}} and {{ii|Sunfire Aegis}} in spite of the item limit imposed by {{nie|Immolate}}.

{{sbc|Quest:}} Obtain {{ii|Hollow Radiance}} and {{ii|Sunfire Aegis}}.

{{sbc|Reward:}} Upon completing your {{sbc|Quest}}, convert the items you obtained for the quest into {{ii|Void Immolation}}.

''{{ii|Void Immolation}} counts as 2 {{as|Burn}} effect sources.''
mayhem.notes_html: * When gaining {{ii|Bami's Cinder}}, you will lose an {{ii|Ruby Crystal}} or a {{ii|Glowing Mote}} in your inventory as it will get upgraded with no gold returned back to you.{{bug}}

mayhem.title: Red Envelopes
mayhem.set_label: [[File:Make it Rain set mayhem.png|30px|link=]] [[ARAM:_Mayhem/Augment_Sets|Make it Rain]]
mayhem.description_html:
Red envelopes will now randomly appear around you every {{pp|25 to 15}} seconds. You can pick up these envelopes by moving over them, granting you between {{g|{{pp|8 to 15}}}} and {{as|{{pp|22 to 46}}|gold}} {{as|gold}}, and {{as|100 '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 3 seconds.

Additionally, whenever you pick an envelope, you gain one of the following stats by random:
  • {{as|5 '''bonus''' attack damage}}
  • {{as|5 ability power}}
  • {{as|5 ability haste}}
  • {{as|5 '''bonus''' armor}}
  • {{as|5 '''bonus''' magic resistance}}
  • {{as|50 '''bonus''' health}}
  • {{as|10% '''bonus''' attack speed}}
  • {{as|5 '''bonus''' movement speed}}
  • {{as|5 Lethality}}
  • {{as|5 magic penetration}}

mayhem.title: Shrink Engine
mayhem.description_html:
Scoring a champion {{tip|takedown}} generates a stack, stacking infinitely. For each stack, gain {{as|8 ability haste}} and {{as|1% '''bonus''' movement speed}}, and reduce your size by 4%. Lose 65% of stacks on death.

''Size reduction is capped at 80% (20 stacks).''

mayhem.title: Sonata
mayhem.set_label:
[[File:Fully Automated set mayhem.png|30px|link=]] [[ARAM:_Mayhem/Augment_Sets|Fully Automated]]
[[File:Wee Woo Wee Woo set mayhem.png|30px|link=]] [[ARAM:_Mayhem/Augment_Sets|Wee Woo Wee Woo]]
mayhem.description_html:
Alternate between {{as|automatically}} casting a modified version of {{cai|Aria of Perseverance|Sona}} and modified {{ai|Song of Celerity|Sona}}, with the former being cast first (10 second cooldown).

{{sbc|Aria of Perseverance:}} {{tip|Heal}} yourself for 60 {{as|(+ 60% AP)}} and send out a tone to the {{tt|most wounded|Based on greatest % missing health}} allied champion within 1000 units that heals them for the same amount. Additionally, generate an {{tt|aura|400 unit radius, center-to-edge}} that grants you and tagged allied champions a 80 {{as|(+ 40% AP)}} {{tip|shield}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.

{{sbc|Song of Celerity:}} Gain {{as|30% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 7 seconds. If you take damage during this time, the duration ends prematurely once or if 3 seconds have elapsed. Additionally, generate an {{tt|aura|400 unit radius, center-to-edge}} that grants tagged allied champions {{as|20% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 3 seconds.

mayhem.title: Soul Eater
mayhem.description_html: {{tip|Immobilize|Immobilizing}} or {{tip|ground|grounding}} an enemy champion grants you {{as|20 '''bonus''' health}}, stacking infinitely (5 second cooldown per {{tip|cast instance}}).

mayhem.title: Speed Demon
mayhem.description_html: Whenever you damage an enemy champion with an ability, gain {{as|200 '''bonus''' movement speed}} decaying over {{fd|0.75}} seconds.

mayhem.title: Spin Me Right Round
mayhem.description_html:
Replace a summoner spell with ''{{cai|Heroic Swing|Akshan}}''.

{{sbc|Heroic Swing - Active:}} You can activate ''Heroic Swing'' three times before the ability goes on cooldown, and you can use the third cast only after {{fd|0.5}} seconds of the second cast. An attack or movement command may be inputted to use the second and third casts.

[[File:Heroic Swing.png|20px|link=]] {{sbc|First Cast:}} Fire a hook in the target direction that embeds in the first [[terrain]] hit for 2 seconds. ''Heroic Swing's'' second cast can be used while the hook is attached. If the hook fails to attach or you become {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}}, {{tip|ground|grounded}}, or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphed}} within the duration, ''Heroic Swing'' is cancelled and placed on full cooldown.

[[File:Heroic Swing 2.png|20px|link=]] {{sbc|Second Cast:}} {{tip|dash|Swing}} around the terrain in either a clockwise or counterclockwise direction based on the position of the cursor {{tt|relative to your facing direction|Dash will move clockwise if the player's cursor is anywhere to the left of their champion from their facing direction (or perspective), and counterclockwise if the cursor is anywhere to their champion's right.}}, stopping upon colliding with an enemy champion or terrain. While swinging, fire at the nearest {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy within 500 units every {{rutngt|0.2}} to deal them {{as|{{pp|15 to 75}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 15% AD)}} {{times}} {{as|(1 + {{fd|0.3}} per 100% '''bonus''' attack speed)}} {{as|physical damage}} and apply {{tip|on-hit}} effects for each shot, with on-hit damage reduced to 25% effectiveness. The dash will be {{tip|knockdown|interrupted}} if you are affected by any {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphing}} crowd control during the dash.

{{sbc|Third Cast:}} End the swing by {{tip|dash|jumping}} to the target location and fire one last shot at a nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy.

Scoring an enemy champion {{tip|takedown}} reduces ''Heroic Swing's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} to {{fd|0.5}} seconds.

{{as|'''This augment is currently disabled.'''|buzzword3}}

mayhem.title: Stats!
mayhem.description_html: Gain 2 {{ii|Stat Bonus|Stat Anvils}}.

mayhem.title: Stats on Stats!
mayhem.description_html: Gain 3 {{ii|Stat Bonus|Stat Anvils}}, with a higher chance of obtaining ''Gold'' and ''Prismatic'' tier anvils.

mayhem.title: Stats on Stats on Stats!
mayhem.description_html: Gain 4 {{ii|Stat Bonus|Stat Anvils}}, with a higher chance of obtaining ''Gold'' and ''Prismatic'' tier anvils. Additionally, on the next round of augment selection, you gain an additional reroll per augment slot.

mayhem.title: Stuck in Here With Me
mayhem.description_html:
Casting your ultimate ability grants you an aura for 2 seconds, growing in size over the duration to up to 500 units. After the duration, you {{tip|taunt}} all enemies within the aura for 2 seconds and gain 50% damage reduction for the same duration (30 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 30 ultimate haste.

''Aura is activated once the ultimate's effect {{tt|starts|For instant-cast spells}} or has {{tt|elapsed|For duration-based spells}}.''
mayhem.notes_html: * On {{ci|Katarina}}, this augment will activate at the start of {{ais|R|Katarina}} channel.

mayhem.title: Twin Fire
mayhem.description_html: Damaging abilities against enemy champions launch 1 {{as|(+ 1 per {{fd|33.33}}% critical strike chance)}} {{as|Firecrackers|fury}} at the target that each deal {{as|{{pp|10 to 30}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 7% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 7% AP)}} {{as|magic damage}} (5 second cooldown). Additionally, gain {{as|15% critical strike chance}}.

mayhem.title: Upgrade Thornmail
mayhem.description_html: Upgrades {{ii|Bramble Vest}} and {{ii|Thornmail}}, empowering {{nie|Thorns}} to generate a protective shell around you. The shell is broken by the next enemy champion to use a basic attack {{tip|on-hit}} against you, which causes them to take {{as|{{pp|50 to 250}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 30% armor)}} {{as|(+ 30% magic resistance)}} {{as|(+ 12% '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|magic damage}}. Shell regenerates after {{pp|20 to 5}} seconds of being [[combat status|out-of-combat]] with enemy champions.

mayhem.title: Virtuous Cycle
mayhem.description_html: Your {{tip|heal|heals}} grant a {{tip|shield}} for 5 seconds that is equal to 20% of the healing value, and your shields grant a heal equal to 20% of the shield's strength. This effect cannot trigger from itself.

mayhem.title: Void Rift
mayhem.description_html: Damaging an enemy champion with an ability summons a {{as|Void Scar|experience}} at the location they were damaged for 6 seconds ({{fd|0.75}}-second cooldown per target). If another {{as|Void Scar|experience}} is summoned within 1250 units, through the same condition, both {{as|Void Scars|experience}} are consumed to create a rift to the void between them that converges over {{fd|0.6}} seconds and has a width of 250 units. Enemies within the rift are dealt {{as|{{pp|100 to 450}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ {{fd|5.5}} per 1 Lethality)}} {{as|(+ {{fd|5.5}} per 1 flat magic penetration)}} {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 99% decaying over 1 second.

mayhem.title: Weighted Popoffs
mayhem.description_html: Hitting an enemy champion with an ability generates a stack of {{as|Popoff|buzzword6}} for 6 seconds, stacking up to 6 times. For each stack, your basic abilities' cooldowns progress {{fd|2.5}}% faster. At maximum {{as|Popoff|buzzword6}} stacks, this value is doubled, for a total of a 30% faster progression time.

mayhem.title: Zealot
mayhem.description_html: Gain {{as|35%|as}} {{as|(+ 5% per 100 AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} and {{as|25%|critical strike chance}} {{as|(+ 5% per 100 AP)}} {{as|critical strike chance}}.

mayhem.title: Hand of Baron
mayhem.description_html: Gain a modified {{bi|Hand of Baron}}, which only grants 25% increased {{tip|adaptive force}} and greatly empowers nearby allied {{tip|minions}}.

mayhem.title: Upgrade Sword of Blossoming Dawn
mayhem.description_html: Upgrades {{ii|Sword of Blossoming Dawn}}, empowering {{nie|Peppermint}} to have its healing increased by 250%. Additionally, you gain {{as|100% '''bonus''' attack speed}}, but your basic attacks against champions now deal 50% damage.
